summary: Iteration 250 - Sentinel Content Moderation & Guilds/Community System Testing Complete. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Community Panel in Orbital Mixer verified with identity modes (full/avatar/ghost), mic/video toggles, guild channels, and widget feeds. Sovereign Dashboard Sentinel tab verified with stats (Intercepted/Blocked/Shadow Mutes), violation categories, shadow-muted users list with unmute button, and violation log.
critical_code_review_comments: sentinel.py: PROHIBITED_PATTERNS regex array covers hate_speech, slurs, sexual, self_harm, violence categories
sentinel.py: scan_text() returns clean=true/false with violations array and risk_score
sentinel.py: Shadow-muted users get clean=true with shadow_blocked=true (content silently dropped)
sentinel.py: Auto-escalation after 3 violations triggers automatic shadow-mute
guilds.py: IDENTITY_MODES supports full/avatar/ghost with visibility and avatar flags
guilds.py: CLASS_GUILDS maps shaman/nomad/architect/merchant to guild channels
guilds.py: WIDGET_FEEDS provides solfeggio/ambient/orbital/forge feed channels
guilds.py: Ghost mode users blocked from posting (403 response)
guilds.py: Ghost user posts shown as 'Anonymous Entity' in feed
CommunityPanel.js: Identity mode selector with full/avatar/ghost buttons
CommunityPanel.js: Mic/video toggles only shown for non-ghost modes
CommunityPanel.js: Sentinel scan integration before posting to feeds
ConstellationPanel.js: Sentinel scan on constellation save (name + description)
SovereignDashboard.js: Sentinel tab (6th tab) with stats, categories, muted users, violation log
FocusContext.js: synthesisCount tracking with recordSynthesis() for progressive disclosure
TrialGraduation.js: MIN_SYNTHESES=3 check before showing modal (progressive disclosure)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 250 verified: (1) Sentinel content moderation system fully working - POST /api/sentinel/scan returns clean=true for safe content, clean=false+blocked=true for prohibited content, or clean=true+shadow_blocked=true for shadow-muted users. (2) Sentinel stats/log/mutes endpoints working. (3) Guilds identity system working - GET/PATCH /api/guilds/identity supports full/avatar/ghost modes. (4) Guild channels and widget feeds accessible via GET /api/guilds/channels. (5) Feed posting works with ghost mode blocking (403). (6) Frontend CommunityPanel accessible via Community button in Orbital Mixer Playground mode at /cosmic-mixer. (7) Sovereign Dashboard Sentinel tab at /sovereign-admin shows all sentinel data. (8) Test user is currently shadow-muted due to test violations.

backend_sentinel_scan_clean.details: POST /api/sentinel/scan returns clean=true for safe content

backend_sentinel_scan_prohibited.details: POST /api/sentinel/scan returns clean=false, blocked=true for prohibited content (or shadow_blocked if user muted)

backend_sentinel_scan_empty.details: POST /api/sentinel/scan returns clean=true for empty content

backend_sentinel_log.details: GET /api/sentinel/log returns entries array with violation details

backend_sentinel_mutes_list.details: GET /api/sentinel/mutes returns list of shadow-muted users

backend_guilds_channels.details: GET /api/guilds/channels returns guilds and feeds arrays

backend_guilds_ghost_post_blocked.details: POST /api/guilds/feed/{feed_id}/post returns 403 for ghost mode users

backend_sentinel_feed_integration.details: Sentinel scan works for feed context

frontend_community_button.details: Community button visible in Orbital Mixer Playground mode at /cosmic-mixer

frontend_community_panel.details: CommunityPanel opens with identity mode selector, mic/video toggles

frontend_identity_modes.details: Full, Avatar, Ghost identity mode buttons present

frontend_mic_video_toggles.details: Mic and Video toggle buttons present in CommunityPanel

frontend_sovereign_sentinel_tab.details: Sentinel tab visible in Sovereign Dashboard at /sovereign-admin

frontend_sentinel_stats_display.details: Intercepted, Blocked, Shadow Mutes stats displayed

frontend_sentinel_violation_log.details: Violation Log section with entries displayed

frontend_sentinel_muted_users.details: Shadow-Muted Users section with Unmute buttons displayed
